scripts.guard:readme-fences: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const bt=String.fromCharCode(96); const fence=bt+bt+bt; const ok=new Set([fence, fence+'bash', fence+'javascript', fence+'typescript']); const lines=fs.readFileSync('README.md','utf8').split(/\r?\n/); const bad=[]; for (let i=0;i<lines.length;i++){ const l=lines[i].trim(); if(l.startsWith(fence) && !ok.has(l)) bad.push(`${i+1}:${lines[i]}`); } if(bad.length){ console.error('❌ invalid fence language found'); console.error(bad.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('✅ only allowed fence languages used');"
